name: Rollin 30 S Bloodstone Piru
description: Blood Stone Pirus) are an African-American street gang located on the East Side of South Los Angeles, California. The BSP originated in the 1970’s around Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, between Avalon Blvd to Central Ave. The BloodStone Pirus have been acted for over thirty year, and falls under the Piru umbrella.
